context: Tests whether the agent uses Apollo Router with Rover CLI for federation setup, writes correct federated schemas with @key/@extends/@external, configures JWKS auth, sets explicit CORS origins (no wildcard), applies correct traffic shaping timeouts and retries, and configures header propagation for subgraphs.

checklist.name: Rover CLI install command
checklist.description: SETUP.md or documentation includes `npm install -g @apollo/rover` to install the Rover CLI

checklist.name: Apollo Router install command
checklist.description: SETUP.md or documentation includes the curl-based install command for Apollo Router (referencing router.apollo.dev)

checklist.name: federation_version in supergraph.yaml
checklist.description: supergraph.yaml specifies federation_version as =2.5.0 (with the = prefix, not just 2.5.0)

checklist.name: @key directive on Product
checklist.description: The catalog subgraph schema defines `type Product @key(fields: "id")` (entity key directive present)

checklist.name: @extends on inventory Product
checklist.description: The inventory subgraph schema uses `type Product @key(fields: "id") @extends` to extend the Product type from catalog

checklist.name: @external on id field
checklist.description: The inventory subgraph marks the `id` field as `@external` since it is owned by the catalog subgraph

checklist.name: JWKS auth configuration
checklist.description: router.yaml configures authentication.router.jwt.jwks with a URL pointing to a /.well-known/jwks.json endpoint

checklist.name: require_authentication: false
checklist.description: router.yaml sets authorization.require_authentication: false to allow public queries

checklist.name: No wildcard CORS
checklist.description: router.yaml CORS configuration does NOT use wildcard '*'; instead lists specific origin URLs

checklist.name: Router timeout 30s
checklist.description: traffic_shaping.router.timeout is set to 30s in router.yaml

checklist.name: Subgraph timeout 10s
checklist.description: traffic_shaping.all.timeout is set to 10s in router.yaml

checklist.name: Retry on 5xx statuses
checklist.description: traffic_shaping retries are enabled with retry_on_http_statuses including [500, 502, 503]

checklist.name: Header propagation config
checklist.description: router.yaml includes headers configuration to propagate Authorization and/or x-customer-id to all subgraphs

checklist.name: Rover compose command
checklist.description: SETUP.md or documentation includes the `rover supergraph compose --config supergraph.yaml` command to build the supergraph
